title: 'Khamenei's son is a lightweight': Trump shares Iran war update, insists US should have role in choosing next leader
summary_full: Amid escalating West Asian tensions and ongoing US-Israeli strikes, President Trump stated Iran is seeking a deal, but "a little bit late." He asserted that Operation Epic Fury is decimating Iran's military capabilities, claiming significant damage to its Air Force and Navy.
